SplendorTenantId.description: Selects the tenant (workspace) the request acts within.
SplendorTenantId.name: x-splendor-tenant-id

Forbidden.description: The token lacks access to the tenant or the role required.

Unauthorized.description: The bearer token is missing, malformed, or expired.

ApiError.description:
Error envelope returned by every Splendor API endpoint.

``detail`` is either a plain message string (most errors) or a structured
``{code, message}`` object (validation and capacity errors that carry a stable
machine-readable code).

detail.message: Semantic search capacity is temporarily exhausted; retry shortly.

ApiError.title: ApiError

ChildTenantCreateRequest.description:
Platform request to provision an isolated child tenant for one of its
end-customers. The tenant id is Splendor-generated; ``external_id`` is the
platform's own mapping key (unique within the platform).
ChildTenantCreateRequest.title: ChildTenantCreateRequest

ClusterViewCreateRequest.description:
Freeze a semantic/hybrid cluster (all members with fused score >= tau, up
to k) into a materialized view that SQL can aggregate exhaustively.

k.description: Max members; bounded by the server's cluster_view_max_members.
k.title: K

seed_queries.description: One or more seed phrasings; their neighborhoods are unioned to widen recall.
seed_queries.title: Seed Queries

tau.description: Fused-score threshold; omit to auto-pick from the score-distribution knee.
tau.title: Tau

ClusterViewCreateRequest.title: ClusterViewCreateRequest

ErrorBody.description: Structured error detail returned by validation and capacity errors.

examples.message: Semantic vector search requires non-empty text.

ErrorBody.title: ErrorBody

collapse.description: Override how lexical hits map to results. 'document' returns the best-ranked record per document (use to force a document listing from a filter-only browse); 'record' returns every matching record (use with a document filter to enumerate each instance of a term within one document). Defaults to document collapse for ranked text and record semantics for filter-only browses. Not valid with semantic search, which always returns document-level results.
collapse.title: Collapse

content_filter.description: For semantic search, which modalities to retrieve: 'text' (default) searches text/document embeddings; 'images' searches image embeddings via SigLIP; 'all' searches both and merges the results.
content_filter.title: Content Filter

example.error_message: Failed to parse record at line 10

failures.error_message: Failed to parse record at line 10

failure.error_message: Failed to parse record at line 10

PlatformKeyCreateRequest.description:
Platform request (authenticated by an existing platform key) to mint an
additional key for itself — the create half of key rotation.
PlatformKeyCreateRequest.title: PlatformKeyCreateRequest

PlatformKeyResponse.description:
A platform API key. The plaintext ``token`` is returned only when the key
is minted; thereafter only the metadata is retrievable.
PlatformKeyResponse.title: PlatformKeyResponse

collapse.description: Override how lexical hits map to results. 'document' returns the best-ranked record per document (use to force a document listing from a filter-only browse); 'record' returns every matching record (use with a document filter to enumerate each instance of a term within one document). Defaults to document collapse for ranked text and record semantics for filter-only browses. Not valid with semantic search, which always returns document-level results.
collapse.title: Collapse

content_filter.description: For semantic search, which modalities to retrieve: 'text' (default) searches text/document embeddings; 'images' searches image embeddings via SigLIP; 'all' searches both and merges the results.
content_filter.title: Content Filter

bearerAuth.description: API token issued from the Splendor console.

info.description:
Splendor is a search and retrieval API for your operational data. Ingest
datasets — logs, documents, and structured records — and query them through one
consistent interface that spans full-text, SQL, and semantic (vector) search.

Every request authenticates with a bearer token and selects a workspace with the
`X-Splendor-Tenant-Id` header. Read and query operations are available to any
member; operations that create, change, or delete data require an admin role.

All search modes return one shared envelope, and every result carries provenance
back to the exact source object it came from.
info.title: Splendor API

get.description: Lists audit log records for the selected tenant.
Lists the connector instances configured in the selected tenant.

post.description: Creates a connector instance for a third-party system. Requires an admin role.

409.description: The request conflicts with the current state of the resource.

delete.description: Deletes a connector instance. Requires an admin role.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Returns a connector instance's configuration.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

put.description: Updates a connector instance's configuration. Requires an admin role.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Lists the managed data-deletion jobs in the selected tenant.
Returns the status of a managed data-deletion job.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

delete.description: Deletes a dataset and enqueues a managed data-deletion job that removes its records and indexed data. Returns the deletion job so you can track it to completion. Requires an admin role.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

post.description: Triggers a job that re-infers a dataset's schema from its records. Use this after changing how data is parsed or when the schema has drifted. Returns the job to poll. Requires an admin role.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Returns the status and progress of a dataset schema rebuild job.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Lists the detection rules configured in the selected tenant.

post.description: Creates a detection rule that evaluates incoming data and can notify a webhook on matches. Requires an admin role.
Dry-runs detection rule code against sample input and returns the result without creating or executing a rule. Use this to validate logic while authoring. Requires an admin role.

delete.description: Deletes a detection rule. Requires an admin role.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Returns a detection rule's full definition, including its logic and notification configuration.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

put.description: Updates a detection rule. Requires an admin role.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Lists past executions of a detection rule with their outcomes.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Lists ingest and processing tasks that failed and landed in the dead-letter queue.
Returns the detail and error message for a dead-letter queue failure.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

post.description: Re-enqueues a failed task from the dead-letter queue. Requires an admin role.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

409.description: The request conflicts with the current state of the resource.

get.description: Lists the fields discovered across the tenant's datasets along with their indexing configuration.

post.description: Promotes a field to a fast, indexed field so it can be used efficiently in filters and aggregations. Requires an admin role.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

post.description: Creates a hosted source backed by Splendor-managed storage, which you load through the hosted upload flow. Requires an admin role.

409.description: The request conflicts with the current state of the resource.

put.description: Updates a hosted source's configuration. Requires an admin role.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

delete.description: Deletes a hosted upload session and its staged data. Requires an admin role.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Reports the processing and readiness status of a hosted upload session by its identifier.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Lists reindex jobs in the selected tenant with their status.

post.description: Starts a job that reindexes a dataset. Returns the job so you can poll or cancel it. Requires an admin role.

get.description: Returns the status and progress of a reindex job.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

post.description: Cancels an in-flight reindex job. Requires an admin role.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

409.description: The request conflicts with the current state of the resource.

get.description: Lists semantic filter backfill jobs in the selected tenant with their status.

post.description: Re-reads a dataset's objects to apply a newly declared `semantic.filters` field to already-embedded records, restamping the filter attributes onto their vectors without re-embedding. Returns a job you can poll. Requires an admin role.

get.description: Returns the status and counts of a semantic filter backfill job.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Lists the data sources configured in the selected tenant.

post.description: Creates a data source that records can be ingested into. Requires an admin role.

409.description: The request conflicts with the current state of the resource.

delete.description: Deletes a source. Requires an admin role.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Returns a source's configuration, including its type and ingest settings.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

put.description: Updates a source's configuration. Requires an admin role.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

delete.description: Revokes a source's ingest token. Requires an admin role.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

post.description: Generates a new ingest token for a source, used to authenticate direct ingestion. Rotating replaces the previous token. Requires an admin role.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Reports a source's ingest readiness status.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Returns usage metrics for the tenant, such as API call and search volumes by mode.
Lists the datasets in the selected tenant with their current state. Use a returned `dataset_id` to scope a search, export, or schema lookup.

503.description: A required backend is temporarily unavailable.

post.description: Checks readiness for multiple datasets in one call, with optional filtering by status, lifecycle state, or identifier prefix. Use this to wait on a batch of datasets after ingesting.

get.description: Reports which capabilities are available for a dataset yet: schema inference, text search, and semantic search. Ingestion and indexing are asynchronous, so poll readiness before relying on a search mode.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Returns the fields Splendor has inferred for a dataset, including their types and indexing. Use the schema to learn which fields you can filter, aggregate, and project in SQL search.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Lists the export jobs in the selected tenant with their status.

post.description: Starts an asynchronous export of a search's full result set. Returns the export job; poll it for status and the download location when complete. Use exports for exhaustive traversal of large result sets.

410.description: The search handle, cursor, or view has expired.

delete.description: Deletes an export job and removes its stored artifact.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Returns an export job's status and, when complete, the details needed to download the exported artifact.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Lists ingest runs across the tenant's sources and datasets with their status and progress. Use this to confirm a load finished before querying it.
Returns the progress and readiness detail for a single ingest run.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

post.description: Ingests structured log records into a source. Accepts a batch and returns `202 Accepted`; the records are processed asynchronously.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

post.description: Starts a multipart upload to a hosted source and returns an upload session. Follow with requests to sign parts, then complete the upload to enqueue ingestion.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

post.description: Aborts an in-progress multipart upload session and discards its parts.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

post.description: Completes a multipart upload after all parts are uploaded and enqueues the uploaded object for ingestion. Track progress with the upload readiness endpoint or ingest runs.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

409.description: The request conflicts with the current state of the resource.

post.description: Returns presigned URLs for uploading parts of a multipart upload session. Upload each part directly to the returned URLs.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

409.description: The request conflicts with the current state of the resource.

get.description: Reports the processing and readiness status of a hosted upload session after completion.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user along with the tenants they can access and their role in each. Call this before selecting a tenant: use a returned `tenant_id` as the `X-Splendor-Tenant-Id` header on subsequent requests. Each tenant also reports its plan and whether role enforcement (RBAC) is enabled.
Returns a short-lived presigned URL for an object's image, for rendering previews of image results. The URL is scoped to the authenticated tenant.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.summary: Get a presigned object image URL

get.description: Lists your platform's API keys with their creation, revocation, and last-used timestamps. The secret token itself is shown only once, when the key is created.

503.description: A required backend is temporarily unavailable.

post.description: Mints an additional platform API key for your platform — the create half of key rotation. The plaintext token is returned once in this response and never again; store it securely, then revoke the old key.

503.description: A required backend is temporarily unavailable.

delete.description: Revokes one of your platform API keys so it can no longer authenticate. Responds with 404 if the key does not exist or belongs to another platform.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

503.description: A required backend is temporarily unavailable.

get.description: Lists the child tenants your platform has provisioned, including each tenant's generated id, your `external_id` mapping, and its plan.

503.description: A required backend is temporarily unavailable.

post.description: Provisions a new isolated tenant for one of your end-customers, authenticated by a platform API key. The tenant id is generated by Splendor; pass an optional `external_id` to map it to your own customer id (unique within your platform). Query and ingest into the child by sending its id in the `X-Splendor-Tenant-Id` header with your platform key.

409.description: The request conflicts with the current state of the resource.

503.description: A required backend is temporarily unavailable.

delete.description: Permanently tears down a child tenant: enqueues a managed deletion job that purges its indexed documents and semantic vectors, removes its staged uploads, and finally deletes the tenant itself. Returns 202 with the deletion job. Responds with 404 if the tenant does not exist or belongs to a different platform. This cannot be undone.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

503.description: A required backend is temporarily unavailable.

get.description: Returns one child tenant your platform owns. Responds with 404 if the tenant does not exist or belongs to a different platform.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

503.description: A required backend is temporarily unavailable.

post.description: Runs a search over one or more datasets and returns the shared search envelope. Supports full-text queries, structured filters, time ranges, and aggregations; set `semantic` to true for vector search. The response includes a `search_id` handle for paging, export, or saving a view, and makes truncation explicit through `has_more`, `next_cursor`, and `total`.

410.description: The search handle, cursor, or view has expired.

503.description: A required backend is temporarily unavailable.

get.description: Streams every result for a search handle as newline-delimited JSON, one normalized result per line. Use this to pull a search's results into a script or notebook without paging by cursor.

application/x-ndjson.example: {"id":"rec_01H8Z3K9QK","title":null,"body":"connection timeout after 30s","snippets":["connection timeout after 30s"],"created_at":"2026-01-15T09:30:00Z","metadata":{"service":"checkout"},"score":12.4,"score_kind":"bm25","provenance":{"tenant_id":"acme","dataset_id":"app-logs","source_bucket":"acme-logs","source_key":"2026/01/15/app-0001.jsonl.gz","source_etag":"\"9b2cf5e1\"","line":4821,"transform_version":"v3"}} {"id":"rec_01H8Z3K9QL","title":null,"body":"upstream request timed out","snippets":["upstream request timed out"],"created_at":"2026-01-15T09:31:00Z","metadata":{"service":"checkout"},"score":11.1,"score_kind":"bm25","provenance":{"tenant_id":"acme","dataset_id":"app-logs","source_bucket":"acme-logs","source_key":"2026/01/15/app-0001.jsonl.gz","source_etag":"\"9b2cf5e1\"","line":4822,"transform_version":"v3"}}

200.description: A stream of newline-delimited JSON, one normalized result per line.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

410.description: The search handle, cursor, or view has expired.

post.description: Executes a SQL query against the dataset's inferred schema and returns the shared search envelope. SQL responses add a `columns` list, and each result places its projected values in `row`. Supports cursor continuation.

410.description: The search handle, cursor, or view has expired.

503.description: A required backend is temporarily unavailable.

post.description: Validates a SQL query against a dataset's schema and returns its translated form without executing it. Use this to check a query and surface errors before running it with SQL search.

get.description: Lists the views in the selected tenant with their kind and record count.

post.description: Creates a view from exactly one source: an existing `from_search_id` handle or a full `search_request`. A view is either materialized (membership and rank frozen at creation) or live (the query re-runs on read). Use materialized views for deterministic, repeatable analysis.

410.description: The search handle, cursor, or view has expired.

post.description: Builds a view by semantic clustering: provide seed queries and a similarity threshold, and Splendor groups records by closeness to those seeds. Use this to organize a large, fuzzy result space into coherent groups.

delete.description: Deletes a view. The underlying records and search handle are not affected.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Returns a view's metadata, including its kind, record count, and creation time.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

patch.description: Updates a view's display name. The view's records and query definition are unchanged.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Returns the records in a view. For materialized views the set is fixed; for live views it reflects the current result of the saved query.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

410.description: The search handle, cursor, or view has expired.
